```yaml
jobs:
  indy_node_tests:
    runs-on: ubuntu-20.04
    env:
      NODE_OPTIONS: '--max_old_space_size=4096'
      SLICE_TOTAL_SLICES: 11
    container:
      image: ghcr.io/${{ inputs.GITHUB_REPOSITORY_NAME }}/node-build:${{ inputs.UBUNTU_VERSION }}
    steps:
      - name: Check out code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Download node deb
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: indy_node-deb

      - name: Install dependencies from deb
        run: |
          apt update
          function getDeps(){
              echo "$(apt show ${1} 2>/dev/null  | grep -P "Depends: " | sed 's~Depends:~~g;s~(~~g;s~)~~g;s~>~~g;s~<~~g' |tr -d " \t\n\r" | tr "," "\n")";
          }
          aptStr=$(dpkg-deb -I $(pwd)/indy-node*.deb | grep -P "Depends: " | sed 's~Depends:~~g;s~(~~g;s~)~~g;s~>~~g;s~<~~g' | tr -d " \t\n\r" | tr "," "\n")
          nodeStr="$(getDeps $(echo "$aptStr" | grep plenum))"
          echo "Installing dependancies:" && \
          echo ${aptStr} && \
          echo ${fullStr}&& \
          echo && \
          apt install -y $(pwd)/indy-node*.deb $aptStr $nodeStr
          apt install -y libindy
          ln -s /usr/lib/ursa/libursa.so /usr/lib/libursa.so
        shell: bash

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: |
          pip --cache-dir /root/.cache/pip install .[tests]

      - name: Run Indy Node ${{ matrix.module }} test slice ${{ matrix.slice }}/ ${{ env.SLICE_TOTAL_SLICES }}
        id: node-test
        run: RUSTPYTHONASYNCIODEBUG=0 python3 runner.py --pytest "python3 -m pytest -l -vv" --dir "${{ matrix.module }}" --output "test-result-node-${{ matrix.slice }}.txt" --test-only-slice "${{ matrix.slice }}/ ${{ env.SLICE_TOTAL_SLICES }}"
```

jobs:

    name: Bump Version Number
    runs-on: ubuntu-20.04
    steps:
      - name: Check out code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Set up Python
        uses: actions/setup-python@v5
        with:
          python-version: '3.8'

      - name: Install deps for version change
        run: |
          sudo apt-key adv --keyserver keyserver.ubuntu.com --recv-keys 9692C00E657DDE61
          sudo add-apt-repository 'deb  https://hyperledger.jfrog.io/artifactory/indy focal stable'
          sudo apt-get update -y && sudo apt-get install -y \

                       libgflags-dev \

                       zlib1g-dev \

                       liblz4-dev

                      wheel \
                      importlib_metadata==3.10.1 \
                      Cython==0.29.36

FROM ubuntu:20.04

ARG DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive
ENV TZ=Europe/Berlin

# Install git separately first
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y git

# Install other system dependencies
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
    wget gnupg apt-transport-https ca-certificates apt-utils curl jq \
    python3 python3-pip python3-nacl \
    rocksdb=5.8.8 libgflags-dev libsnappy-dev zlib1g-dev libbz2-dev liblz4-dev \
    zstd ruby ruby-dev rubygems gcc make libssl1.0.0 ursa=0.3.2-1 libindy=1.15.0~1625-bionic

# Move ursa libs
RUN mv /usr/lib/ursa/* /usr/lib && rm -rf /usr/lib/ursa

# Install Python build-time packages
RUN pip3 install -U setuptools==50.3.2 'pyzmq==22.3.0' Cython==0.29.36

# Install fpm packaging gems
RUN gem install --no-document rake dotenv:2.8.1 fpm:1.14.2

# Clean apt caches
RUN apt-get -y autoremove && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Clone project
WORKDIR /app
ARG REPO_URL
RUN test -n "$REPO_URL" && git clone --depth 1 "$REPO_URL" indy_node

# Set working directory to the project
WORKDIR /app/indy_node

# Install project dependencies
RUN pip --cache-dir /root/.cache/pip install .[tests]

CMD ["/bin/bash"]

FROM ubuntu:20.04

ARG DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive
ENV TZ=Europe/Berlin

# Install git and gnupg separately first
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y git gnupg

# Add Hyperledger repository keys
RUN apt-key adv --keyserver keyserver.ubuntu.com --recv-keys 9692C00E657DDE61

# Add apt sources for dependencies
RUN echo 'deb https://hyperledger.jfrog.io/artifactory/indy focal dev' >> /etc/apt/sources.list

# Install other system dependencies
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
    wget apt-transport-https ca-certificates apt-utils curl jq \
    python3 python3-pip python3-nacl \
    rocksdb=5.8.8 libgflags-dev libsnappy-dev zlib1g-dev libbz2-dev liblz4-dev \
    zstd ruby ruby-dev rubygems gcc make libssl1.0.0 ursa=0.3.2-1 libindy=1.15.0~1625-bionic

# Move ursa libs
RUN mv /usr/lib/ursa/* /usr/lib && rm -rf /usr/lib/ursa

# Install Python build-time packages
RUN pip3 install -U setuptools==50.3.2 'pyzmq==22.3.0' Cython==0.29.36

# Install fpm packaging gems
RUN gem install --no-document rake dotenv:2.8.1 fpm:1.14.2

# Clean apt caches
RUN apt-get -y autoremove && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Clone project
WORKDIR /app
ARG REPO_URL
RUN test -n "$REPO_URL" && git clone --depth 1 "$REPO_URL" indy_node

# Set working directory to the project
WORKDIR /app/indy_node

# Install project dependencies
RUN pip --cache-dir /root/.cache/pip install .[tests]

CMD ["/bin/bash"]

# Install other system dependencies
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
    wget apt-transport-https ca-certificates apt-utils curl jq \
    python3 python3-pip python3-nacl \
    rocksdb=5.8.8 libgflags-dev libsnappy-dev zlib1g-dev libbz2-dev liblz4-dev \

# Move ursa libs
RUN mv /usr/lib/ursa/* /usr/lib && rm -rf /usr/lib/ursa

# Install Python build-time packages
RUN pip3 install -U setuptools==50.3.2 'pyzmq==22.3.0' Cython==0.29.36

# Install fpm packaging gems
RUN gem install --no-document rake dotenv:2.8.1 fpm:1.14.2

# Clean apt caches

# Clone project
WORKDIR /app
ARG REPO_URL

WORKDIR /app/indy_node

# Install project dependencies
RUN pip --cache-dir /root/.cache/pip install .[tests]

CMD ["/bin/bash"]

tool_args.text:
FROM ubuntu:18.04

ARG DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive
ENV TZ=Europe/Berlin

# Install git and gnupg separately first
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y git gnupg

# Add Hyperledger repository keys
RUN apt-key adv --keyserver keyserver.ubuntu.com --recv-keys 9692C00E657DDE61

# Add apt sources for dependencies from Hyperledger
RUN echo 'deb https://hyperledger.jfrog.io/artifactory/indy focal dev' >> /etc/apt/sources.list

# Install other system dependencies, including libzmq3-dev
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
    wget apt-transport-https ca-certificates apt-utils curl jq \
    python3 python3-pip python3-nacl \
    libgflags-dev libsnappy-dev zlib1g-dev libbz2-dev liblz4-dev \
    zstd ruby ruby-dev rubygems gcc make libssl1.0.0 libzmq3-dev

# Install setuptools first
RUN pip3 install --no-cache-dir -U setuptools==50.3.2

# Install other Python packages
RUN pip3 install --no-cache-dir -U 'pyzmq==22.3.0' Cython==0.29.36

# Move ursa libs if the directory exists.
RUN if [ -d /usr/lib/ursa ]; then mv /usr/lib/ursa/* /usr/lib && rm -rf /usr/lib/ursa; fi

# Install fpm packaging gems
RUN gem install --no-document rake dotenv:2.8.1 fpm:1.14.2

# Clean apt caches
RUN apt-get -y autoremove && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Clone project
WORKDIR /app
ARG REPO_URL
RUN test -n "$REPO_URL" && git clone --depth 1 "$REPO_URL" indy_node

# Set working directory to the project
WORKDIR /app/indy_node

# Install project dependencies
RUN pip --cache-dir /root/.cache/pip install .[tests]

CMD ["/bin/bash"]

FROM ubuntu:18.04

ARG DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive
ENV TZ=Europe/Berlin

# Install git and gnupg separately first
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y git gnupg

# Add Hyperledger repository keys
RUN apt-key adv --keyserver keyserver.ubuntu.com --recv-keys 9692C00E657DDE61

# Add Ruby PPA
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y software-properties-common && \
    add-apt-repository ppa:brightbox/ruby-ng --yes

# Install other system dependencies including Ruby 3.0.0 and dev files.
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
    wget apt-transport-https ca-certificates apt-utils curl jq \
    python3 python3-pip python3-nacl python3-dev \
    libgflags-dev libsnappy-dev zlib1g-dev libbz2-dev liblz4-dev \
    zstd ruby3.0 ruby3.0-dev

# Install setuptools first
RUN pip3 install --no-cache-dir -U setuptools==50.3.2

# Install other Python packages
RUN pip3 install --no-cache-dir -U 'pyzmq==22.3.0' Cython==0.29.36

# Move ursa libs if the directory exists.
RUN if [ -d /usr/lib/ursa ]; then mv /usr/lib/ursa/* /usr/lib && rm -rf /usr/lib/ursa; fi

# Install fpm packaging gems
RUN gem install --no-document rake dotenv:2.8.1 fpm:1.14.2

# Clean apt caches
RUN apt-get -y autoremove && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Clone project
WORKDIR /app
ARG REPO_URL
RUN test -n "$REPO_URL" && git clone --depth 1 "$REPO_URL" indy_node

# Set working directory to the project
WORKDIR /app/indy_node

# Install project dependencies
RUN pip --cache-dir /root/.cache/pip install .[tests]

CMD ["/bin/bash"]

FROM ubuntu:18.04

ARG DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive
ENV TZ=Europe/Berlin

# Install git and gnupg separately first
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y git gnupg

# Add Hyperledger repository keys
RUN apt-key adv --keyserver keyserver.ubuntu.com --recv-keys 9692C00E657DDE61

# Install other system dependencies including Ruby 
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
    wget apt-transport-https ca-certificates apt-utils curl jq \
    python3 python3-pip python3-nacl python3-dev \
    libgflags-dev libsnappy-dev zlib1g-dev libbz2-dev liblz4-dev \
    zstd ruby ruby-dev

# Installing packaging module
RUN pip3 install --no-cache-dir packaging

# Install setuptools first
RUN pip3 install --no-cache-dir -U setuptools==50.3.2

# Install other Python packages
RUN pip3 install --no-cache-dir -U 'pyzmq==22.3.0' Cython==0.29.36

# Move ursa libs if the directory exists.
RUN if [ -d /usr/lib/ursa ]; then mv /usr/lib/ursa/* /usr/lib && rm -rf /usr/lib/ursa; fi

# Install fpm packaging gems
RUN gem install --no-document rake dotenv:2.8.1 fpm:1.14.2

# Clean apt caches
RUN apt-get -y autoremove && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Clone project
WORKDIR /app
ARG REPO_URL
RUN test -n "$REPO_URL" && git clone --depth 1 "$REPO_URL" indy_node

# Set working directory to the project
WORKDIR /app/indy_node

# Install project dependencies
RUN pip --cache-dir /root/.cache/pip install .[tests]

CMD ["/bin/bash"]

FROM ubuntu:18.04

ARG DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive
ENV TZ=Europe/Berlin

# Install git and gnupg separately first
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y git gnupg

# Add Hyperledger repository keys
RUN apt-key adv --keyserver keyserver.ubuntu.com --recv-keys 9692C00E657DDE61

# Add Ruby PPA
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y software-properties-common && \
    add-apt-repository ppa:brightbox/ruby-ng --yes

# Install other system dependencies including Ruby
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
    wget apt-transport-https ca-certificates apt-utils curl jq \
    python3 python3-pip python3-nacl python3-dev \
    libgflags-dev libsnappy-dev zlib1g-dev libbz2-dev liblz4-dev \
    zstd ruby ruby-dev

# Installing packaging module
RUN pip3 install --no-cache-dir packaging

# Install setuptools first
RUN pip3 install --no-cache-dir -U setuptools==50.3.2

# Install other Python packages
RUN pip3 install --no-cache-dir -U 'pyzmq==22.3.0' Cython==0.29.36

# Move ursa libs if the directory exists.
RUN if [ -d /usr/lib/ursa ]; then mv /usr/lib/ursa/* /usr/lib && rm -rf /usr/lib/ursa; fi

# Install fpm packaging gems
RUN gem install --no-document rake dotenv:2.8.1 fpm:1.14.2

# Clean apt caches
RUN apt-get -y autoremove && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Clone project
WORKDIR /app
ARG REPO_URL
RUN test -n "$REPO_URL" && git clone --depth 1 "$REPO_URL" indy_node

# Set working directory to the project
WORKDIR /app/indy_node

# Install project dependencies
RUN pip --cache-dir /root/.cache/pip install .[tests]

CMD ["/bin/bash"]

ARG DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive
ENV TZ=Europe/Berlin

# Install essential packages
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y software-properties-common git gnupg

# Add required repositories for Ruby
RUN add-apt-repository ppa:brightbox/ruby-ng --yes

# Install dependencies
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
    wget apt-transport-https ca-certificates apt-utils curl jq \

  "dockerfile_used": "FROM ubuntu:18.04

ARG DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive
ENV TZ=Europe/Berlin

# Install git and gnupg separately first
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y git gnupg

# Add Hyperledger repository keys
RUN apt-key adv --keyserver keyserver.ubuntu.com --recv-keys 9692C00E657DDE61

# Add Ruby PPA
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y software-properties-common && \
    add-apt-repository ppa:brightbox/ruby-ng --yes

# Install Ruby and related tools before other dependencies
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
    wget apt-transport-https ca-certificates apt-utils curl jq \
    python3 python3-pip python3-nacl python3-dev \
    libgflags-dev libsnappy-dev zlib1g-dev libbz2-dev liblz4-dev \
    build-essential zstd ruby ruby-dev

# Install Ruby gems needed for the project
RUN gem install --no-document rake dotenv:2.8.1 fpm:1.14.2

# Installing packaging module
RUN pip3 install --no-cache-dir packaging

# Install setuptools first
RUN pip3 install --no-cache-dir -U setuptools==50.3.2

# Install other Python packages
RUN pip3 install --no-cache-dir -U 'pyzmq==22.3.0' Cython==0.29.36

# Move ursa libs if the directory exists.
RUN if [ -d /usr/lib/ursa ]; then mv /usr/lib/ursa/* /usr/lib && rm -rf /usr/lib/ursa; fi

# Clean apt caches
RUN apt-get -y autoremove && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Clone project
WORKDIR /app
ARG REPO_URL
RUN test -n "$REPO_URL" && git clone --depth 1 "$REPO_URL" indy_node

# Set working directory to the project
WORKDIR /app/indy_node

# Install project dependencies
RUN pip --cache-dir /root/.cache/pip install .[tests]

CMD ["/bin/bash"]"
}

tool_args.text:
FROM ubuntu:20.04

ARG DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive
ENV TZ=Europe/Berlin

# Update package lists and install essential packages including GnuPG first
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y gnupg git

# Add Hyperledger repository keys
RUN apt-key adv --keyserver keyserver.ubuntu.com --recv-keys 9692C00E657DDE61 && \
    apt-key adv --keyserver keyserver.ubuntu.com --recv-keys CE7709D068DB5E88

# Add Hyperledger repository
RUN echo "deb https://hyperledger.jfrog.io/artifactory/indy focal dev" >> /etc/apt/sources.list

# Install other system dependencies
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
    wget apt-transport-https ca-certificates apt-utils curl jq \
    python3 python3-pip python3-nacl \
    rocksdb=5.8.8 libgflags-dev libsnappy-dev zlib1g-dev \
    libbz2-dev liblz4-dev zstd ruby ruby-dev rubygems \
    gcc make libssl1.0.0 ursa=0.3.2-1 libindy=1.15.0~1625-bionic

# Install Python packages
RUN pip3 install -U setuptools==50.3.2 'pyzmq==22.3.0' Cython==0.29.36

# Install fpm gem without documentation
RUN gem install --no-document rake dotenv:2.8.1 fpm:1.14.2

# Clean up unnecessary files
RUN apt-get -y autoremove && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Clone project
WORKDIR /app
ARG REPO_URL
RUN test -n "$REPO_URL" && git clone --depth 1 "$REPO_URL" indy_node

# Set working directory to the project
WORKDIR /app/indy_node

# Install runtime dependencies
RUN pip --cache-dir /root/.cache/pip install .[tests]

```dockerfile
FROM ubuntu:20.04

ARG DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive
ENV TZ=Europe/Berlin

# Update package lists and install essential packages including GnuPG first
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y gnupg git

# Add Hyperledger repository keys
RUN apt-key adv --keyserver keyserver.ubuntu.com --recv-keys 9692C00E657DDE61 && \
    apt-key adv --keyserver keyserver.ubuntu.com --recv-keys CE7709D068DB5E88

# Add Hyperledger/Sovrin repositories
RUN echo "deb https://hyperledger.jfrog.io/artifactory/indy focal dev" >> /etc/apt/sources.list && \
    echo "deb http://security.ubuntu.com/ubuntu bionic-security main" >> /etc/apt/sources.list && \
    echo "deb https://repo.sovrin.org/deb bionic master" >> /etc/apt/sources.list && \
    echo "deb https://repo.sovrin.org/sdk/deb bionic master" >> /etc/apt/sources.list

# Install other system dependencies
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
    wget apt-transport-https ca-certificates apt-utils curl jq \
    python3 python3-pip python3-nacl \
    rocksdb=5.8.8 libgflags-dev libsnappy-dev zlib1g-dev \
    libbz2-dev liblz4-dev zstd ruby ruby-dev rubygems \
    gcc make libssl1.0.0 ursa=0.3.2-1 libindy=1.15.0~1625-bionic

# Install Python packages
RUN pip3 install -U setuptools==50.3.2 'pyzmq==22.3.0' Cython==0.29.36

# Install fpm gem without documentation
RUN gem install --no-document rake dotenv:2.8.1 fpm:1.14.2

# Clean up unnecessary files
RUN apt-get -y autoremove && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Clone project
WORKDIR /app
ARG REPO_URL
RUN test -n "$REPO_URL" && git clone --depth 1 "$REPO_URL" indy_node

# Set working directory to the project
WORKDIR /app/indy_node

# Install runtime dependencies
RUN pip --cache-dir /root/.cache/pip install .[tests]
```

tool_args.text:
FROM ubuntu:20.04

ARG DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive
ENV TZ=Europe/Berlin

# Update package lists and install essential packages including GnuPG first
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y gnupg git

# Add Hyperledger repository keys
RUN apt-key adv --keyserver keyserver.ubuntu.com --recv-keys 9692C00E657DDE61 && \
    apt-key adv --keyserver keyserver.ubuntu.com --recv-keys CE7709D068DB5E88

# Add Hyperledger repository
RUN echo "deb https://hyperledger.jfrog.io/artifactory/indy focal dev" >> /etc/apt/sources.list

# Add Ubuntu Bionic repositories for legacy packages
RUN echo "deb http://security.ubuntu.com/ubuntu bionic-security main" >> /etc/apt/sources.list
RUN echo "deb https://repo.sovrin.org/deb bionic master" >> /etc/apt/sources.list
RUN echo "deb https://repo.sovrin.org/sdk/deb bionic master" >> /etc/apt/sources.list

# Install other system dependencies
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
    wget apt-transport-https ca-certificates apt-utils curl jq \
    python3 python3-pip python3-nacl \
    rocksdb=5.8.8 libgflags-dev libsnappy-dev zlib1g-dev \
    libbz2-dev liblz4-dev zstd ruby ruby-dev rubygems \
    gcc make libssl-dev ursa=0.3.2-1 libindy

# Install Python packages
RUN pip3 install -U setuptools==50.3.2 'pyzmq==22.3.0' Cython==0.29.36

# Install fpm gem without documentation
RUN gem install --no-document rake dotenv:2.8.1 fpm:1.14.2

# Clean up unnecessary files
RUN apt-get -y autoremove && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Clone project
WORKDIR /app
ARG REPO_URL
RUN test -n "$REPO_URL" && git clone --depth 1 "$REPO_URL" indy_node

# Set working directory to the project
WORKDIR /app/indy_node

# Install runtime dependencies
RUN pip --cache-dir /root/.cache/pip install .[tests]

tool_args.text:
FROM ubuntu:20.04

ARG DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive
ENV TZ=Europe/Berlin

# Update package lists and install essential packages including GnuPG first
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y gnupg git

# Add Hyperledger repository keys
RUN apt-key adv --keyserver keyserver.ubuntu.com --recv-keys 9692C00E657DDE61 && \ 
    apt-key adv --keyserver keyserver.ubuntu.com --recv-keys CE7709D068DB5E88

# Add Hyperledger repository
RUN echo "deb https://hyperledger.jfrog.io/artifactory/indy focal dev" >> /etc/apt/sources.list

# Install other system dependencies without specific versions
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
    wget apt-transport-https ca-certificates apt-utils curl jq \
    python3 python3-pip python3-nacl \
    rocksdb libgflags-dev libsnappy-dev zlib1g-dev \
    libbz2-dev liblz4-dev zstd ruby ruby-dev rubygems \
    gcc make libssl-dev ursa libindy

# Install Python packages
RUN pip3 install -U setuptools==50.3.2 'pyzmq==22.3.0' Cython==0.29.36

# Install fpm gem without documentation
RUN gem install --no-document rake dotenv:2.8.1 fpm:1.14.2

# Clean up unnecessary files
RUN apt-get -y autoremove && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Clone project
WORKDIR /app
ARG REPO_URL
RUN test -n "$REPO_URL" && git clone --depth 1 "$REPO_URL" indy_node

# Set working directory to the project
WORKDIR /app/indy_node

# Install runtime dependencies
RUN pip --cache-dir /root/.cache/pip install .[tests]

tool_args.text:
FROM ubuntu:20.04

ARG DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive
ENV TZ=Europe/Berlin

# Update package lists and install essential packages including GnuPG first
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y gnupg git

# Add Hyperledger repository keys
RUN apt-key adv --keyserver keyserver.ubuntu.com --recv-keys 9692C00E657DDE61 && \ 
    apt-key adv --keyserver keyserver.ubuntu.com --recv-keys CE7709D068DB5E88

# Add Hyperledger repository
RUN echo "deb https://hyperledger.jfrog.io/artifactory/indy focal dev" >> /etc/apt/sources.list

# Install other system dependencies without specific versions
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
    wget apt-transport-https ca-certificates apt-utils curl jq \
    python3 python3-pip python3-nacl \
    rocksdb libgflags-dev libsnappy-dev zlib1g-dev \
    libbz2-dev liblz4-dev zstd ruby ruby-dev rubygems \
    gcc make libssl-dev ursa libindy

# Install Python packages
RUN pip3 install -U setuptools==50.3.2 'pyzmq==22.3.0' Cython==0.29.36

# Install fpm gem without documentation
RUN gem install --no-document rake dotenv:2.8.1 fpm:1.14.2

# Clean up unnecessary files
RUN apt-get -y autoremove && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Clone project
WORKDIR /app
ARG REPO_URL
RUN test -n "$REPO_URL" && git clone --depth 1 "$REPO_URL" indy_node

# Set working directory to the project
WORKDIR /app/indy_node

# Install runtime dependencies
RUN pip --cache-dir /root/.cache/pip install .[tests]

RUN apt-key adv --keyserver keyserver.ubuntu.com --recv-keys 9692C00E657DDE61 && \ 
    apt-key adv --keyserver keyserver.ubuntu.com --recv-keys CE7709D068DB5E88

# Add Hyperledger repository
RUN echo "deb https://hyperledger.jfrog.io/artifactory/indy focal dev" >> /etc/apt/sources.list

# Commenting out Sovrin repositories that are failing
# RUN echo "deb http://security.ubuntu.com/ubuntu bionic-security main" >> /etc/apt/sources.list
# RUN echo "deb https://repo.sovrin.org/deb bionic master" >> /etc/apt/sources.list
# RUN echo "deb https://repo.sovrin.org/sdk/deb bionic master" >> /etc/apt/sources.list

# Install other system dependencies without specific versions
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
    wget apt-transport-https ca-certificates apt-utils curl jq \
    python3 python3-pip python3-nacl \
    libgflags-dev libsnappy-dev zlib1g-dev \
    libbz2-dev liblz4-dev zstd ruby ruby-dev rubygems \
    gcc make libssl-dev

# Install Python packages
RUN pip3 install -U setuptools==50.3.2 'pyzmq==22.3.0' Cython==0.29.36

# Install fpm gem without documentation
RUN gem install --no-document rake dotenv:2.8.1 fpm:1.14.2

# Clean up unnecessary files
RUN apt-get -y autoremove && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Clone project
WORKDIR /app
ARG REPO_URL
RUN test -n "$REPO_URL" && git clone --depth 1 "$REPO_URL" indy_node

# Set working directory to the project
WORKDIR /app/indy_node

# Install runtime dependencies
RUN pip --cache-dir /root/.cache/pip install .[tests]

ARG DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

# Update package lists and install essential packages including GnuPG first

    wget apt-transport-https ca-certificates apt-utils curl jq \
    python3 python3-pip python3-nacl \
    ruby ruby-dev zlib1g-dev

# Install Python packages

# Install fpm gem without documentation
RUN gem install --no-document rake dotenv:2.8.1 fpm:1.14.2

# Clean up unnecessary files
RUN apt-get -y autoremove && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Clone project
WORKDIR /app
ARG REPO_URL
RUN test -n "$REPO_URL" && git clone --depth 1 "$REPO_URL" indy_node

# Set working directory to the project
WORKDIR /app/indy_node

# Install runtime dependencies
RUN pip --cache-dir /root/.cache/pip install .[tests]"}

FROM ubuntu:20.04

ARG DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive
ENV TZ=Europe/Berlin

# Update package lists and install essential packages including GnuPG first
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y gnupg git software-properties-common

# Add Hyperledger repository keys
RUN apt-key adv --keyserver keyserver.ubuntu.com --recv-keys 9692C00E657DDE61 && \ 
    apt-key adv --keyserver keyserver.ubuntu.com --recv-keys CE7709D068DB5E88

# Add Hyperledger repository
RUN echo "deb https://hyperledger.jfrog.io/artifactory/indy focal dev" >> /etc/apt/sources.list

# Install other system dependencies without specific versions
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
    wget apt-transport-https ca-certificates apt-utils curl jq \
    python3 python3-pip python3-nacl \
    ruby ruby-dev zlib1g-dev

# Install Python packages
RUN pip3 install -U setuptools==50.3.2 'pyzmq==22.3.0' Cython==0.29.36

# Install fpm gem without documentation
RUN gem install --no-document rake dotenv:2.8.1 fpm:1.14.2

# Clean up unnecessary files
RUN apt-get -y autoremove && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Clone project
WORKDIR /app
ARG REPO_URL
RUN test -n "$REPO_URL" && git clone --depth 1 "$REPO_URL" indy_node

# Set working directory to the project
WORKDIR /app/indy_node

# Install runtime dependencies
RUN pip --cache-dir /root/.cache/pip install .[tests]

RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
    wget apt-transport-https ca-certificates apt-utils curl jq \
    python3 python3-pip python3-nacl \
    ruby3.0 ruby3.0-dev zlib1g-dev

# Install Python packages
RUN pip3 install -U setuptools==50.3.2 'pyzmq==22.3.0' Cython==0.29.36

# Install fpm gem without documentation
RUN gem install --no-document rake dotenv:2.8.1 fpm:1.14.2

# Clean up unnecessary files
RUN apt-get -y autoremove && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Clone project
WORKDIR /app
ARG REPO_URL
RUN test -n "$REPO_URL" && git clone --depth 1 "$REPO_URL" indy_node

# Set working directory to the project
WORKDIR /app/indy_node

# Install runtime dependencies
RUN pip --cache-dir /root/.cache/pip install .[tests]

FROM ubuntu:20.04

ARG DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive
ENV TZ=Europe/Berlin

# Update package lists and install essential packages including GnuPG and Ruby 3.0 first
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y gnupg git software-properties-common

# Add Hyperledger repository keys
RUN apt-key adv --keyserver keyserver.ubuntu.com --recv-keys 9692C00E657DDE61 && \ 
    apt-key adv --keyserver keyserver.ubuntu.com --recv-keys CE7709D068DB5E88

# Add Hyperledger repository
RUN echo "deb https://hyperledger.jfrog.io/artifactory/indy focal dev" >> /etc/apt/sources.list

# Install other system dependencies with specific Ruby version
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
    wget apt-transport-https ca-certificates apt-utils curl jq \
    python3 python3-pip python3-nacl \
    ruby3.0 ruby3.0-dev zlib1g-dev

# Install Python packages
RUN pip3 install -U setuptools==50.3.2 'pyzmq==22.3.0' Cython==0.29.36

# Install fpm gem without documentation
RUN gem install --no-document rake dotenv:2.8.1 fpm:1.14.2

# Clean up unnecessary files
RUN apt-get -y autoremove && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Clone project
WORKDIR /app
ARG REPO_URL
RUN test -n "$REPO_URL" && git clone --depth 1 "$REPO_URL" indy_node

# Set working directory to the project
WORKDIR /app/indy_node

# Install runtime dependencies
RUN pip --cache-dir /root/.cache/pip install .[tests]

RUN apt-key adv --keyserver keyserver.ubuntu.com --recv-keys 9692C00E657DDE61 && \ 
    apt-key adv --keyserver keyserver.ubuntu.com --recv-keys CE7709D068DB5E88

# Add Hyperledger repository
RUN echo "deb https://hyperledger.jfrog.io/artifactory/indy focal dev" >> /etc/apt/sources.list

# Install other system dependencies without specific versions
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
    wget apt-transport-https ca-certificates apt-utils curl jq \
    python3 python3-pip python3-nacl \
    ruby ruby-dev zlib1g-dev

# Install Python packages
RUN pip3 install -U setuptools==50.3.2 'pyzmq==22.3.0' Cython==0.29.36

# Install fpm gem without documentation
RUN gem install --no-document rake dotenv:2.8.1 fpm:1.14.2

# Clean up unnecessary files
RUN apt-get -y autoremove && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Clone project
WORKDIR /app
ARG REPO_URL
RUN test -n "$REPO_URL" && git clone --depth 1 "$REPO_URL" indy_node

# Set working directory to the project
WORKDIR /app/indy_node

# Install runtime dependencies
RUN pip --cache-dir /root/.cache/pip install .[tests]"}

FROM ubuntu:20.04

ARG DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive
ENV TZ=Europe/Berlin

# Update package lists and install essential packages including GnuPG first
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y gnupg git software-properties-common

# Add Hyperledger repository keys
RUN apt-key adv --keyserver keyserver.ubuntu.com --recv-keys 9692C00E657DDE61 && \ 
    apt-key adv --keyserver keyserver.ubuntu.com --recv-keys CE7709D068DB5E88

# Add Hyperledger repository
RUN echo "deb https://hyperledger.jfrog.io/artifactory/indy focal dev" >> /etc/apt/sources.list

# Install other system dependencies without specific versions
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
    wget apt-transport-https ca-certificates apt-utils curl jq \
    python3 python3-pip python3-nacl \
    ruby ruby-dev zlib1g-dev

# Install Python packages
RUN pip3 install -U setuptools==50.3.2 'pyzmq==22.3.0' Cython==0.29.36

# Install fpm gem without documentation
RUN gem install --no-document rake dotenv:2.8.1 fpm:1.14.2

# Clean up unnecessary files
RUN apt-get -y autoremove && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Clone project
WORKDIR /app
ARG REPO_URL
RUN test -n "$REPO_URL" && git clone --depth 1 "$REPO_URL" indy_node

# Set working directory to the project
WORKDIR /app/indy_node

# Install runtime dependencies
RUN pip --cache-dir /root/.cache/pip install .[tests]

tool_args.text:
FROM ubuntu:20.04

ARG DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive
ENV TZ=Europe/Berlin

# Install essential packages
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y git gnupg software-properties-common

# Add Ruby PPA repository for Ruby >= 3.0.0
RUN add-apt-repository ppa:brightbox/ruby-ng --yes

# Add Hyperledger repository keys
RUN apt-key adv --keyserver keyserver.ubuntu.com --recv-keys 9692C00E657DDE61 && \
    apt-key adv --keyserver keyserver.ubuntu.com --recv-keys CE7709D068DB5E88

# Add Hyperledger repository for dependencies
RUN echo "deb https://hyperledger.jfrog.io/artifactory/indy focal dev" >> /etc/apt/sources.list

# Install system dependencies including Python and required libraries
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
    wget apt-transport-https ca-certificates apt-utils curl jq \
    python3 python3-pip python3-nacl rocksdb=5.8.8 \
    libgflags-dev libsnappy-dev zlib1g-dev libbz2-dev liblz4-dev \
    zstd ruby3.0 ruby3.0-dev build-essential libssl1.0.0 ursa=0.3.2-1 libindy=1.15.0~1625-bionic

# Install Python build-time requirements
RUN pip3 install -U setuptools==50.3.2 'pyzmq==22.3.0' Cython==0.29.36

# Install the fpm for packaging
RUN gem install --no-document rake dotenv:2.8.1 fpm:1.14.2

# Clean up
RUN apt-get -y autoremove && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Clone the project repository
WORKDIR /app
ARG REPO_URL
RUN test -n "$REPO_URL" && git clone --depth 1 "$REPO_URL" indy_node

# Set the working directory to the cloned project
WORKDIR /app/indy_node

# Install project dependencies
RUN pip --cache-dir /root/.cache/pip install .[tests]

# Default command to run on container start
CMD ["/bin/bash"]

ARG DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive
ENV TZ=Europe/Berlin

# Add Ruby PPA repository for Ruby >= 3.0.0
RUN add-apt-repository ppa:brightbox/ruby-ng --yes

# Add Hyperledger repository keys

CMD ["/bin/bash"]"}

CMD ["/bin/bash"]"}

FROM ubuntu:20.04

ARG DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive
ENV TZ=Europe/Berlin

# Install essential packages
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y git gnupg software-properties-common \
    && add-apt-repository ppa:brightbox/ruby-ng --yes

# Add Hyperledger repository keys
RUN apt-key adv --keyserver keyserver.ubuntu.com --recv-keys 9692C00E657DDE61 && \
    apt-key adv --keyserver keyserver.ubuntu.com --recv-keys CE7709D068DB5E88

# Add Hyperledger repository for dependencies
RUN echo "deb https://hyperledger.jfrog.io/artifactory/indy focal dev" >> /etc/apt/sources.list

# Install dependencies including rocksdb dev headers
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
    wget apt-transport-https ca-certificates apt-utils curl jq \
    python3 python3-pip python3-nacl rocksdb librocksdb-dev \
    libgflags-dev libsnappy-dev zlib1g-dev libbz2-dev liblz4-dev \
    zstd ruby ruby-dev build-essential python3-dev

# Install Python build-time requirements
RUN pip3 install -U setuptools==50.3.2 'pyzmq==22.3.0' Cython==0.29.36

# Clean up unnecessary files
RUN apt-get -y autoremove && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Clone the project repository
WORKDIR /app
ARG REPO_URL=https://github.com/hyperledger-indy/indy-node
RUN git clone --depth 1 "$REPO_URL" indy_node

# Set the working directory to the cloned project
WORKDIR /app/indy_node

# Install project dependencies, altered for testing purposes
RUN pip --cache-dir /root/.cache/pip install .[tests]

# Default command to run on container start
CMD ["/bin/bash"]

# Install essential packages
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y git gnupg software-properties-common \
    && add-apt-repository ppa:brightbox/ruby-ng --yes

# Add Hyperledger repository keys
RUN apt-key adv --keyserver keyserver.ubuntu.com --recv-keys 9692C00E657DDE61 && \
    apt-key adv --keyserver keyserver.ubuntu.com --recv-keys CE7709D068DB5E88

# Add Hyperledger repository for dependencies
RUN echo "deb https://hyperledger.jfrog.io/artifactory/indy focal dev" >> /etc/apt/sources.list

# Install dependencies including rocksdb dev headers
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
    wget apt-transport-https ca-certificates apt-utils curl jq \
    python3 python3-pip python3-nacl rocksdb librocksdb-dev \
    libgflags-dev libsnappy-dev zlib1g-dev libbz2-dev liblz4-dev \
    zstd ruby ruby-dev build-essential python3-dev

# Install Python build-time requirements
RUN pip3 install -U setuptools==50.3.2 'pyzmq==22.3.0' Cython==0.29.36

# Clean up unnecessary files
RUN apt-get -y autoremove && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Clone the project repository
WORKDIR /app
ARG REPO_URL=https://github.com/hyperledger-indy/indy-node
RUN git clone --depth 1 "$REPO_URL" indy_node

# Set the working directory to the cloned project
WORKDIR /app/indy_node

# Install project dependencies, altered for testing purposes
RUN pip --cache-dir /root/.cache/pip install .[tests]

# Default command to run on container start
CMD ["/bin/bash"]

```dockerfile
FROM ubuntu:22.04

ARG DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive
ENV TZ=Europe/Berlin
ENV LANG=C.UTF-8

# Install git separately first (CRITICAL RULE)
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y git && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Install other system dependencies
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
    tzdata \
    wget \
    gnupg \
    apt-transport-https \
    ca-certificates \
    apt-utils \
    curl \
    jq \
    build-essential \
    gcc \
    make \
    pkg-config \
    python3 \
    python3-pip \
    python3-venv \
    python3-dev \
    python3-nacl \
    libgflags-dev \
    libsnappy-dev \
    zlib1g-dev \
    libbz2-dev \
    liblz4-dev \
    zstd \
    librocksdb-dev \
    libzmq3-dev \
    ruby \
    ruby-dev \
    rubygems \
    libssl-dev \
    && ln -snf /usr/share/zoneinfo/$TZ /etc/localtime \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Add Hyperledger/Indy APT repository (some packages in project CI come from this repo).
# Note: we add the focal "dev" repo as commonly used in upstream Dockerfiles; it's included
# to help satisfy libindy/ursa/other legacy deps if present. This may produce warnings but
# is required for reproducibility with upstream CI.
RUN set -eux; \
    apt-key adv --keyserver keyserver.ubuntu.com --recv-keys 9692C00E657DDE61 || true; \
    apt-key adv --keyserver keyserver.ubuntu.com --recv-keys CE7709D068DB5E88 || true; \
    echo "deb https://hyperledger.jfrog.io/artifactory/indy focal dev" > /etc/apt/sources.list.d/hyperledger-indy.list || true; \
    apt-get update

# Install / upgrade Python build-time packages that are known to be required
RUN pip3 install --no-cache-dir -U pip wheel setuptools==50.3.2 \
    "pyzmq==22.3.0" "Cython==0.29.36" packaging

# Install Ruby gems needed for packaging (fpm requires Ruby >= 3.0; ubuntu:22.04 provides Ruby 3.x)
RUN gem install --no-document fpm rake dotenv -v "2.8.1" || true

# Create working dir
WORKDIR /app

# Allow passing a different repository URL; default to upstream repo
ARG REPO_URL=https://github.com/hyperledger-indy/indy-node
# Clone the repository (depth 1 to keep image small)
RUN test -n "$REPO_URL" && git clone --depth 1 "$REPO_URL" indy-node

# Set working directory inside the cloned repository
WORKDIR /app/indy-node

# Default command: open a shell. The helper script (provided separately) should be run inside the container.
CMD ["/bin/bash"]
```

#!/usr/bin/env bash
# run_tests.sh - installs project dependencies, builds the project, and runs tests inside the container
# Usage: inside the container run: /bin/bash /app/indy-node/run_tests.sh
set -euo pipefail

REPO_DIR="/app/indy-node"
VENV_DIR="${REPO_DIR}/.venv"

echo "Starting run_tests.sh"
echo "Repository directory: ${REPO_DIR}"

if [ ! -d "${REPO_DIR}" ]; then
  echo "ERROR: Repository directory ${REPO_DIR} not found. Did you mount/clone the repo into the container?"
  exit 1
fi

cd "${REPO_DIR}"

# Ensure Python version is adequate
PY_VERSION=$(python3 -c 'import sys; print(".".join(map(str, sys.version_info[:2])))')
echo "Detected python version: ${PY_VERSION}"
python_major=$(python3 -c 'import sys; print(sys.version_info[0])')
python_minor=$(python3 -c 'import sys; print(sys.version_info[1])')
if [ "${python_major}" -lt 3 ] || { [ "${python_major}" -eq 3 ] && [ "${python_minor}" -lt 8 ]; }; then
  echo "ERROR: Python >= 3.8 is required. Detected ${PY_VERSION}."
  exit 2
fi

# Create and activate a virtualenv to avoid modifying system Python packages
if [ ! -d "${VENV_DIR}" ]; then
  echo "Creating virtualenv at ${VENV_DIR}"
  python3 -m venv "${VENV_DIR}"
fi

# shellcheck disable=SC1091
source "${VENV_DIR}/bin/activate"

# Upgrade pip/wheel inside venv
pip install --upgrade pip wheel setuptools==50.3.2

# Pre-install critical Python packages that often require native libs (helps avoid cryptic build failures)
echo "Installing build-time Python packages (pyzmq, Cython, packaging)..."
pip install --no-cache-dir "pyzmq==22.3.0" "Cython==0.29.36" packaging

# Try to install the project including test extras. This may fail if some pinned system libs are missing
echo "Installing project (including [tests] extras)..."
if ! pip install --no-cache-dir ".[tests]"; then
  echo "Warning: pip install .[tests] failed. Attempting to continue and run tests where possible."
  echo "Installing minimal test runner (pytest) to be able to run tests directly..."
  pip install --no-cache-dir pytest pytest-asyncio pytest-xdist pytest-forked || true
fi

# Ensure PYTHONPATH includes repo root so tests can import local modules if package isn't installed
export PYTHONPATH="${REPO_DIR}:${PYTHONPATH:-}"

# Run tests. We run the test suite and allow tests to fail—the script will exit with pytest's exit code.
echo "Running pytest (tests/). This will run all tests discovered under tests/."
if [ -d "${REPO_DIR}/tests" ]; then
  pytest -q tests || exit $?
else
  echo "No tests/ directory detected. Attempting to run 'pytest' to discover tests elsewhere."...
